name: Creamy First-Down Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 can Eagle Brand Sweetened Condensed Milk (14 oz; NOT evaporated milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Line a 9-inch square pan with aluminum foil.
3. Combine crumbs, sugar, and margarine; press firmly on the bottom of the prepared pan.
4. Bake for 8 minutes.
5. Cool completely.
6. In a heavy saucepan over low heat, melt Hershey's Chocolate Chips with Eagle Brand Sweetened Condensed Milk and vanilla extract.
7. Remove from heat; stir in cream cheese until well blended.
8. Stir in chopped nuts.
9. Spread mixture over the prepared crust.
10. Chill for 2 hours or until firm.
11. Lift fudge from the pan onto a cutting board; peel off foil and cut into squares.
12. Store covered in the refrigerator.
Prep time: 15 minutes.
